lead.description: ExpoCaptive is your trusted source for verified trade show and exhibitor data — helping businesses connect with decision-makers from global expos and industry events. We empower B2B marketers, sales teams, and event professionals to turn every trade show into a lead-generating opportunity. Our curated data covers 20,000+ international expos, featuring detailed exhibitor profiles, visitor insights, and company information across industries.
